title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 293.290 - Detonators or caps not kept in magazine in coal mine
text:
293.290.  Detonators or caps not kept in magazine in coal mine. — No detonators or explosive caps shall be kept in the same magazine in a coal mine with any blasting powder or other high explosive.
(L. 1959 S.B. 188 § 32)
